Title: Jûryoku to no tatakai! Baburusu-kun o tsukamaero
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Toshio Furukawa, Naoki Tatsuta
Plot: A FIGHT AGAINST GRAVITY _ CATCH BUBBLES : Before he can start his training, Goku must make King Kai laugh. Thereafter, his first training is to try and catch King Kai's pet monkey, Bubbles. Meanwhile, Piccolo and Gohan continue to...
